CustomField.formula: IF( General_Impression_avg__c =0, "", IF(AND(General_Impression_avg__c >=0 , General_Impression_avg__c <= 4 ), "גרוע",IF( General_Impression_avg__c <= 6 , "לא טוב",IF( General_Impression_avg__c <= 8 , "טוב",IF( General_Impression_avg__c <= 10 , "מצוין","")))))
CustomField.label: Doctor Impression Text
